description: A faithful black-and-cream programmer cat Codex pet with heavy straight black bangs, warm sleepy yellow eyes, a brass bell collar, a brown leather tool pouch, and a quiet Machinarium-like companion mood.

idle.notes: Quiet seated idle with tiny blink, minimal ear and bangs motion, and a stable bell and tool pouch.

walk.notes: Short careful walk rows used for normal motion and true drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Curious observing loop with slight head tilt, focused glance, and subdued thinky energy.

happy.notes: Restrained satisfied reaction with a tiny smile and soft tail motion.

sleep.notes: Desk-side tucked sleep with closed eyes and one subtle yawn beat.

think.notes: Mapped to the same quiet curious-think loop as curious due the fixed atlas.

code.notes: Quiet coding loop with a tiny brass laptop and minimal typing motion.

play.notes: Gentle play-pounce loop with a tiny toy kept physically near the paws.

repair.notes: Careful repair loop with a tiny robot companion kept touching the paws or body.

yawn.notes: Approximated inside the sleep row as a brief sleepy yawn because the atlas has no separate yawn row.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true left-facing and right-facing walk rows rather than any mirrored guess.

think.notes: Shares the same subdued curious-think loop as curious due the fixed atlas.

yawn.notes: Included as the brief yawn beat inside the sleep row because the fixed atlas has no standalone yawn strip.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing walk strip
right drag uses the true right-facing walk strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, eyes, body, tool pouch, and tail all stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
the black bangs, brass bell, brown tool pouch, and fluffy tail remain readable in both directional rows

referenceFidelityAnchors: brown leather tool pouch with tiny wrench
cream muzzle and compact black-and-cream body
